title: Pokenite
description: Pokenite is a pixelmon modpack your objective is to play get rich and train your pokemons to fight against the world, winning epic pokemon battles and world tournaments. come live this adventure with us and share every moment!
body:
Hi! Our server delivers a distinctive experience, offering countless hours of entertainment with genuine Pixelmon gameplay that embodies the essence of classic gaming. Dive in and enjoy the adventure!

Server IP: Pokenite.net 
Discord: https://discord.pokenite.net/
Site: https://www.pokenite.net

Pixelmon, powered by: https://pixelmonmod.com/
